title: Pokemon Detail Lookup, Derived Views, Units, and Provenance · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent conservation group receives a different region, command sequence, API fixture, cache age, concurrency budget, accessibility need, platform, and injected failure and transfers pokemon detail lookup, derived views, units, and provenance into a changed human-readable validated Pokemon detail view. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of human-readable validated Pokemon detail view with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction,…
objectives: Accept numeric ID or constrained canonical name, retain requested and resolved identity, and reject ambiguous or hostile input.
Model stable identity, species, types, abilities, stats, dimensions, and optional fields separately from the transport DTO.
Convert height and weight only under documented API units, label original and displayed units, and test rounding boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Pokedex Go Pokemon Lookup Iden…
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab Go team handles case 5169 during a clean cross-platform package smoke. Build deterministic Go evidence to validate Pokemon detail fields, unit conversions, ordered presentation, and provenance; all goroutines, bodies, signals, timers, and files require named cleanup ownership; then change one resource identity, pagination link, JSON field, status, or body budget and revalidate admission. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original fixtures only. Real PokéAPI traffic, DNS, sockets, TLS, host files, terminals, signals, race and leak claims, load, cross-platform packaging, accessibility review, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Pokedex product engineering and Go Commit to the mission model · Lab Pokedex Go Pokemon Lookup Iden….
